issue_title: Adding custom font affects performance (LCP) a lot
issue_body_preview:
Hey there!

I am amazed by the DX of this module and how easy it is to add a new web font to your Nuxt project. I want to make my application as performant as possible and the problem is when I add a web font (instead of using default machine font) the performance of the app (and more specifically L
test_description_zh: 在 Nuxt 项目中使用 @nuxt/fonts 模块添加自定义网络字体，构建并加载首页，观察页面字体渲染时机以及 LCP（Largest Contentful Paint）性能指标，检查字体资源是否被预加载（preload）以及是否存在字体加载导致的渲染阻塞。
expected_result_zh: 页面加载时自定义字体资源应通过 <link rel='preload'> 进行预加载，字体应快速渲染到页面上而不会造成明显的布局偏移或 LCP 回退，LCP 指标不应因使用自定义字体而大幅恶化。
